episodes.title: Chapter 27: The Psychology of Cult Leaders ~ The 48 Laws
episodes.description:
Review and Commentary of Chapter 27 of The 48 Laws by Robert Greene. 

1. Is creating a devoted following leadership… or manipulation?
2. Do people want certainty more than truth?
3 . Can online communities become “cult-like”?
4 .Do influencers use some of the same tactics described in Law 27?
5. Are modern politics an example of Law 27 in action?
6. Where is the line between inspiration and manipulation?
7. Can you think of a public figure who uses this law well?
8. Can Law 27 ever be used in a positive way?
9. Have you ever followed someone who later disappointed you?
10. Is skepticism healthy or cynical?
11. Is Law 27 describing human nature… or teaching people how to exploit it?

The 48 Laws pdf: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1dcQFbMemuBofNHna_5IGdMsGifchHhGy/view?usp=sharing
